---
title: "Technical Notes"
---

This section will contain technical notes, tutorials and reproducible workflows related to hydrology, water resources and environmental data science.

Planned topics include:

- Intensity–Duration–Frequency (IDF) curve development in R
- GEV and Gumbel distributions for hydrological frequency analysis
- Working with PISCO precipitation data
- Reproducible hydrological research using R and Quarto
- Rainfall–runoff modelling workflows
- Hydrological uncertainty assessment
- Data quality control and gap-filling techniques
